Name: Install Cursor IDE
Description: Download from cursor.com, sign up for Pro ($20/mo). This is your main coding tool.

Name: Install Node.js v18+
Description: Download Mac installer from nodejs.org. Required for the project to run.

Name: Create GitHub account + repo
Description: Create account at github.com. Create a new repository called 'tobu-wall-of-fame'. This stores all your code.

Name: Create Firebase project
Description: Go to console.firebase.google.com. Create project 'tobu-wall-of-fame'. Enable Firestore database (start in test mode). Choose europe-west region.

Name: Create Meshy AI account
Description: Sign up at meshy.ai. This generates 3D bull models from text prompts.

Name: Create Tripo AI account
Description: Sign up at tripo3d.ai. Backup 3D generator.

Name: Create Luma AI account
Description: Sign up at lumalabs.ai/genie. Backup 3D generator.

Name: Install Blender
Description: Download from blender.org. Free 3D editor for cleaning up AI-generated models.

Name: Sign up on Vercel
Description: Sign up at vercel.com. Connect your GitHub account. This hosts the live app.

Name: Scaffold project in Cursor
Description: Open Cursor, use Agent Mode to create React + Vite + TypeScript project with all dependencies. Create folder structure. Verify it renders a green plane in browser.
Depends On: Install Cursor IDE; Install Node.js v18+

Name: Create .cursorrules file
Description: Create the project rules file so Cursor understands the app's conventions, stack, and style.

Name: Export WhatsApp group chat
Description: Open the section WhatsApp group → Settings → More → Export Chat → Without media. Save the .txt file.

Name: Upload chat export to Claude
Description: Upload the .txt file to claude.ai. Use the extraction prompt from the game plan to identify all Tobu poll winners.

Name: Review and verify extracted data
Description: Go through Claude's JSON output entry by entry. Verify winner names match the roster. Fix dates. Rewrite unclear stories. Check for missed polls.

Name: Save seed_data.json
Description: Save the cleaned JSON as seed_data.json in /src/assets/. This seeds the farm with past winners.

Name: Generate bull on Meshy AI
Description: Use the bull generation prompt from the game plan. Download result as .glb. Try 3-5 prompt variations if first result isn't great.

Name: Generate bull on Tripo AI
Description: Same prompt as Meshy. Download .glb. Compare results.

Name: Generate bull on Luma AI
Description: Same prompt as Luma Genie. Download .glb. Compare all three results.

Name: Pick best bull model
Description: Compare all three outputs side by side. Pick the most charming, toy-like one. If none are usable, buy a pre-made model from Sketchfab ($5-10).
Depends On: Generate bull on Meshy AI; Generate bull on Tripo AI; Generate bull on Luma AI

Name: Import bull into Blender
Description: Open Blender. File → Import → glTF. Ask Claude to walk you through it step by step.
Depends On: Pick best bull model; Install Blender

Name: Check and reduce poly count
Description: In Blender: check face count (should be <500). If higher, apply Decimate modifier. Claude guides you through this.

Name: Fix geometry and artifacts
Description: Remove floating vertices, fix holes, clean up any weird shapes the AI generated. Ask Claude for help on each issue.

Name: Set neutral material and center model
Description: Set material to plain white/light gray (colors applied in code later). Center model at origin. Scale to ~1 unit tall.

Name: Export hero bull as .glb
Description: File → Export → glTF. Check 'Apply Modifiers'. Save as bull.glb in /src/assets/models/.
Depends On: Set neutral material and center model

Name: Generate barn model
Description: Use Meshy: 'Low-poly red barn, simple geometry, farm building, no texture, solid colors'. Clean up in Blender. Export as barn.glb.

Name: Generate signpost model
Description: Use Meshy: 'Low-poly wooden signpost scoreboard, farm style, no texture'. Clean up in Blender. Export as signpost.glb.

Name: Create mascot Tobu model
Description: In Blender: duplicate hero bull, scale 1.5x, apply Barcelona red (#D50032) and yellow (#FFCD00) colors. Export as mascot.glb.

Name: Download Kenney.nl farm assets
Description: Browse kenney.nl/assets. Download Nature Kit or similar pack. Get fence, tree, grass, rock models.

Name: Generate moo sound effect
Description: Use ElevenLabs Sound Effects to generate a soft 'moo'. Download as moo.mp3.

Name: Download ambient farm audio
Description: Search Freesound.org for 'farm ambient loop'. Download a clean looping track (CC license). Save as ambient.mp3.

Name: Generate Tobu logo
Description: Use ChatGPT or Claude image gen: 'App icon: cute low-poly 3D bull face, red and yellow gradient background, square rounded corners'. Save as tobu-logo.png + icon-192.png + icon-512.png.

Name: Build ground and sky
Description: Create Farm.tsx with rolling hills ground plane, sky, lighting, and OrbitControls (locked above horizon). Use the Cursor prompt from the game plan.

Name: Place farm landmarks
Description: Create Barn, Signpost, Mascot, and Fences components. Load .glb models. Position on the farm. Add click handlers (barn message, signpost toggle, mascot about text).
Depends On: Build ground and sky; Export hero bull as .glb; Generate barn model; Generate signpost model; Create mascot Tobu model

Name: Build BullHerd with InstancedMesh
Description: The most complex component. InstancedMesh renders all bulls in one draw call. Per-instance colors from name hash. Bobbing and rotation animations. Click detection via raycasting. Camera pan on tap.

Name: Build speech bubble component
Description: HTML overlay via drei's Html component. Shows story, name, emoji reactions. One emoji per user per bull. Triggers NamePicker if no identity. Dismisses on outside tap.

Name: Build audio manager
Description: Howler.js preload. Zustand mute state (default: muted). Ambient loop. Moo on tap. MuteButton in top-right corner.

Name: Test 3D scene on iPhone Safari
Description: Open localhost on your iPhone (same WiFi). Check: orbit controls, bull tapping, speech bubbles, performance. Fix any issues.

Name: Set up Firebase in the project
Description: Initialize Firebase with env vars. Create helper functions for tobus, roster, and admin config. Set up Firestore security rules.

Name: Scrape section directory for roster
Description: Open section directory page. Copy HTML or use Claude to extract all full names into a JSON array. Clean up and deduplicate. Save as roster.json.

Name: Create and run seed script
Description: Node.js script that uploads seed_data.json (past winners) and roster.json (member names) to Firestore. Generates bull colors and positions. Sets admin PIN.
Depends On: Set up Firebase in the project; Save seed_data.json; Scrape section directory for roster

Name: Connect BullHerd to Firestore
Description: Replace mock data with real-time Firestore listener. Bulls should appear from the database. Verify all ~24-26 pre-populated bulls render correctly.
Depends On: Create and run seed script; Build BullHerd with InstancedMesh

Name: Build NamePicker component
Description: Full-screen overlay with searchable roster list. Appears on first reaction attempt. Saves name to localStorage. UserBadge in top-left corner.

Name: Wire up emoji reactions to Firestore
Description: On emoji tap: check identity, save to Firestore reactions map (replace previous). Real-time listener updates counts across devices.

Name: Build admin PIN authentication
Description: Gear icon bottom-left. PIN input overlay. Verify against Firestore config/admin. SessionStorage for admin state.
Depends On: Set up Firebase in the project

Name: Build barn submission form
Description: Bottom-sheet overlay (admin only). Winner dropdown from roster, story input (280 chars), optional photo, date picker. No term selector (defaults to 3). Bull appears immediately on submit.
Depends On: Build admin PIN authentication; Connect BullHerd to Firestore

Name: Build admin edit and delete
Description: List of all entries below the barn form. Edit button pre-fills form. Delete button with confirmation prompt.

Name: Build leaderboard overlay
Description: Modal triggered by signpost click. Ranked list: rank, colored circle, full name, win count. Styled as wooden scoreboard.
Depends On: Connect BullHerd to Firestore; Place farm landmarks

Name: Build loading screen
Description: Tobu logo centered. Cycling messages every 1.5s. Barcelona color scheme. Fade-out transition. PORTFOLIO-QUALITY design.

Name: Build cinematic camera intro
Description: First visit only. Camera sweeps from high to default position over 3.5s. Skippable. localStorage flag. Disable OrbitControls during sweep.

Name: Build onboarding hint
Description: Animated tap gesture near a bull. CSS keyframes. Disappears after 3s or first tap. First visit only.

Name: Build offline detection
Description: Listen to navigator.onLine. Show friendly message when offline. Auto-dismiss on reconnect.

Name: Create PWA manifest
Description: manifest.json with app name, icons, theme color. Service worker for asset caching.

Name: Performance optimization
Description: Verify InstancedMesh is working. Disable shadows. Frustum culling. Lazy load audio. Test fps on real devices.

Name: Full testing pass on iPhone
Description: Run through the complete testing checklist from the game plan. Every feature, every edge case.

Name: Full testing pass on Android
Description: Share Vercel preview URL with Android tester. Have them check all core flows.

Name: Fix bugs from testing
Description: Address all issues found during iPhone and Android testing. Prioritize: broken features > visual glitches > polish.
Depends On: Full testing pass on iPhone; Full testing pass on Android

Name: Deploy to Vercel
Description: Push to GitHub. Import in Vercel. Set build command and env vars. Deploy.

Name: Beta test on live URL
Description: Open live URL on your phone + testers' phones. Verify everything works on the production build.

Name: Fix any live-only bugs
Description: Some bugs only appear in production (CORS, HTTPS, asset paths). Fix and redeploy.

Name: Share PIN with Steph
Description: Message Steph privately. Share the PIN. Walk her through: gear icon → PIN → tap barn → add Tobu.

Name: Surprise launch in WhatsApp
Description: Post the launch message in the section WhatsApp group. Include the URL and 'Add to Home Screen' tip.
